summary: Base W9 — first post-deload step-up week. Template permanently changed 6/16 (Adj #92): Hyp A Wed→Tue, threshold Tue→Wed, Thu now off. Hill-stride debut landed clean Mon (Adj #44/#91). Wed threshold 4×8 @ T logged — ran 7:45–7:52/mi at RIR 2–3 'almost too easy' (cooler weather) and hit a peak HR of 190 = strongest run-MHR signal yet, so the owed standalone fresh-day max test (1500m all-out / treadmill ramp, Adj #9/#53/#93) is now strongly indicated — Fri (today, fresh off Thu) or W10 is the window. Tendons holding: zero knee signal (first clean-knee quality run since 6/13), L Achilles only a transient end-of-rep blip. Remaining: Fri 40 min easy + strides (or the owed max test); Sat long 60 + Hyp B (calf 335 bump released, Adj #40/#89). Keep Mon/Sat-long genuinely easy on the tighter quality spacing.
